stemHtml: The aeroplane outside air temperature probe measures the…

options.a: static air temperature, this must be corrected for compressibility effects to obtain the total air temperature.
options.b: total air temperature, this must be corrected for compressibility effects to obtain the static air temperature.
options.c: total air temperature, this must be corrected for ram rise and recovery factor to obtain the static air temperature.
options.d: static air temperature, this must be corrected for ram rise and recovery factor to obtain the total air temperature.
